/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libmine_teleop_chassis_bridge.dylib -install_name @rpath/libmine_teleop_chassis_bridge.dylib CMakeFiles/mine_teleop_chassis_bridge.dir/chassis_control_bridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mine_teleop_chassis_bridge.dir/Volumes/SystemDisk/Workspace/MinePilot/src/can_db.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mine_teleop_chassis_bridge.dir/Volumes/SystemDisk/Workspace/MinePilot/src/can_receiver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mine_teleop_chassis_bridge.dir/Volumes/SystemDisk/Workspace/MinePilot/src/can_sender.cpp.o  /Volumes/SystemDisk/Workspace/MinePilot/libchassis_control.so
